name: @team-soju/discord-bot
description: Discord bot for Team Soju - manages team members and shiny Pokemon

scripts.dev:staging: cross-env REGISTER_COMMANDS_ON_START=true wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.discord:dev: wrangler versions upload --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging --preview-alias dev && npm run register
scripts.deploy:cf: wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env="" && npm run register
scripts.deploy:cf:staging: wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging && npm run register
scripts.deploy:cf:staging:preview:dev: wrangler versions upload --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging --preview-alias dev

author: Tu-An Nguyen
